change_description: Assessment-driven revisions: (1) Added Semantic Scholar as 7th source, removed AIS eLibrary; (2) Added Cohen's κ inter-rater reliability metric with κ≥0.70 threshold; (3) Justified two-block search design; (4) Added explicit grey literature policy; (5) Added English-only language restriction; (6) Extended extraction codebook with 20 Hoefler-framework fields for Stage B; (7) Added GRADE-adapted certainty-of-evidence assessment; (8) Added pilot screening documentation plan and calibration log template

author: TVW

change_description: Amendment A2: (1) Removed max_results cap — all sources now fetch complete result sets per SLR completeness requirements (Kitchenham & Charters 2007); (2) OpenAlex switched from full-text search= to title_and_abstract.search filter to align with standard SLR field-restricted searching (TITLE-ABS-KEY equivalent); (3) Scopus recommended query template added — tightened specific leaking terms (derivative→derivative pricing, trading→algorithmic trading, banking removed, hedging→hedge fund/financial hedging) while preserving high-recall terms (Monte Carlo, portfolio phrases, finance/financial); (4) arXiv category filtering remains opt-in only (not applied by default) per protocol §7 design rationale of maximising recall at search stage. Pilot runs showed 10k+ capped results across three sources with estimated >80% noise from incidental full-text matches and generic term overlap with quantum chemistry/physics.
author: TVW

change_description: Deprecated run folders matching '2026-03-10_' via rerun-clean. Rationale: Ran with old broad query (bare leaky terms: qubit, portfolio, derivative, trading, banking). Replaced by 2026-03-10-v2 runs using tightened SLR_QUERY from config.

change_description: Amendment A4: Screening design changed from single-reviewer with 4 mitigations to two-reviewer calibrate-then-split (50-record calibration round with κ ≥ 0.70 target; remaining records split equally; borderline escalation; re-screening after gap). §8b rewritten from single-reviewer limitations to split-screening limitations. Screening Excel workbooks generated.
author: TVW

change_description: Major restructuring: (1) SLR repositioned as Phase 1a within exploratory sequential mixed-methods design (Creswell & Creswell 2018) — added §0b; (2) Two-stage design (Stage A/Stage B) collapsed into single-stage SLR with tiered extraction (Tier 1: evidence mapping for all papers; Tier 2: Hoefler advantage assessment for papers with quantitative evaluation); (3) §9 eligibility criteria unified with tier2_applicable flag replacing Stage B gate; (4) Added cross-cutting RQ6; (5) Added objective 5; (6) Added §12 outputs for cross-method synthesis. SLR search screening dedup and analytical framework unchanged.
author: TVW

change_description: Amendment A5 — Search query refinement to reduce noise: Block 1 changes: (1) Replaced bare Grover with "Grover's algorithm" OR "Grover search"; (2) Replaced bare HHL with "HHL algorithm" OR "Harrow-Hassidim-Lloyd"; (3) Added "quantum phase estimation"; (4) Added "quantum neural network*". Block 2 changes: (5) Removed "Monte Carlo" (matched QMC physics papers); (6) Removed "risk analysis" (too generic); (7) Added "interest rate" OR "bond pricing" OR "fixed income". Previous v2 search runs deprecated; re-running with refined query.
author: TVW

change_description: Deprecated run folders matching '2026-03-10-v2' via manual move. Rationale: Amendment A5 — old query with Monte Carlo noise and bare Grover/HHL. Replaced by 2026-03-10-v3 runs.

change_description: Amendment A6 — Block 1 and Block 2 query expansion: Block 1 additions: (1) Added "gate-based quantum" OR "hybrid quantum-classical"; (2) Added "quantum linear system*"; (3) Added "fault tolerant quantum" (unquoted variant); (4) Added NISQ; (5) Added QMCI. Block 2 additions: (6) Added "computational finance"; (7) Added "asset management"; (8) Added "structured product*"; (9) Added "interest rate derivative*"; (10) Added "counterparty risk" OR "liquidity risk"; (11) Added "expected shortfall" OR CVaR; (12) Added "credit valuation adjustment"; (13) Added "potential future exposure" OR PFE; (14) Added Greeks; (15) Added "default prediction"; (16) Added "anti-money laundering"; (17) Added "trade execution"; (18) Added "market microstructure"; (19) Added "financial forecasting". config.py SLR_QUERY updated to match protocol. Previous v3 search runs deprecated; re-running with expanded query.

change_description: Amendment A7 — Expanded benchmark validation set from 10 to 20 known-relevant papers. New papers: Egger et al. (2021) credit risk QAE; Grossi et al. (2022) fraud detection QSVM; Alcazar et al. (2022) CVA/xVA; Slate et al. (2021) quantum walks portfolio; Yalovetzky et al. (2024) HHL portfolio; Emmanoulopoulos & Dimoska (2022) QNN time series; Matsakos & Nield (2024) fixed income QMC; Zoufal et al. (2019) qGAN option pricing; Stamatopoulos & Zeng (2024) QSP derivative pricing; Ciceri et al. (2025) algorithmic bond trading. Extended set covers all 10 problem families, all listed quantum methods (QAE, QAOA, VQE, HHL, quantum walks, QML/QNN, QSP, qGAN), both hardware regimes (NISQ real hardware + fault-tolerant resource estimation), and all evaluation types (real hardware, simulator, analytical, resource estimation).
author: TVW

change_description: Amendment A8 — Added AI-assisted screening layer to title/abstract screening workflow. Human calibrate-then-split design (§8) retained as primary screening method. AI screening via active-learning tool (ASReview LAB) added as supplementary recall-safety-net per Cochrane/Campbell/JBI/CEE joint position (Flemyng et al. 2025). Includes held-out validation subset, false-negative audit of AI-excluded records, and transparent reporting per PRISMA-trAIce (Holst et al. 2025). Full-text screening remains human-only. §8c added for AI-assisted screening limitations and reporting commitments. §13 updated to include PRISMA-trAIce compliance.
author: TVW

change_description: Amendment A9 — AI-assisted screening tool changed from ASReview active learning to LLM-based classification via Azure OpenAI. ASReview failed to discriminate with 50 labels (all records predicted include with ≈0.67 confidence). Azure OpenAI requires no training set. All validation/audit procedures unchanged.
author: TVW

change_description: Deprecated run folders matching '2026-03-13-v4' via rerun-clean. Rationale: Re-running full pipeline from scratch per reviewer request
author: slr_toolkit

change_description: Amendment A10 — LLM screening model changed from gpt-4.1-mini to o4-mini (OpenAI reasoning model) after evaluating gpt-4.1-mini (572 include 17.7%), DeepSeek-V3.2 (failed: 94% ERR-LLM due to rate limits/auth), and o4-mini (600 include 18.6% 0 errors). Added LLM-assisted thematic topic coding (§10) via topic-code CLI command using o4-mini. 600 included papers coded across 12 controlled topics, 8 method families, and 5 evaluation types. Topic taxonomy and summary report generated.
author: TVW

change_description: Amendment A11 — Production AI-screening run and documentation reconciliation. The current completed repository screening run uses gpt-5-mini via the official openai SDK against the Azure OpenAI Responses API. Model-trial history retained: gpt-4.1-mini, DeepSeek-V3.2, o4-mini, and gpt-5-mini. Protocol §8c and repository documentation updated to match current active artifacts and counts: 6,232 ingested records, 3,222 duplicates removed, 3,010 unique records screened, with 651 AI include decisions and 2,359 AI exclude decisions.
author: TVW
